items.description: A sleeveless midi dress featuring a square neckline, a button-front bodice, an elasticated or ruched waist, and a full, gathered skirt extending to mid-calf. The fabric has a slightly textured appearance and is patterned with a large-scale plaid/check design composed of intersecting thin and thicker lines.
A small, structured rectangular crossbody bag with a front flap closure and a long, adjustable shoulder strap. The material appears to be smooth leather.
Flat, closed-toe Mary Jane style shoes with a rounded toe, a strap across the instep with a buckle closure, and intricate cut-out perforation details across the vamp and sides.
A digital smartwatch with a square face and a sleek band.
A thin, possibly beaded or braided string bracelet on the left wrist.
